import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import ta

def generate_signals(df, params):
    macd_line = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], window_slow=params['window_slow'], window_fast=params['window_fast'], window_sign=params['window_signal']).macd()
    signal_line = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], window_slow=params['window_slow'], window_fast=params['window_fast'], window_sign=params['window_signal']).macd_signal()
    signals = np.where(macd_line > signal_line, 1, np.where(macd_line < signal_line, -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits momentum shifts identifiable through MACD crossover signals, capturing trend reversals effectively.
